evals.prompt: I need to add a Lambda function to my Amazon Connect AI agent so it can check order status when customers call. My Connect instance is in us-east-1 and I already have the Lambda ready.
evals.expected_output: Creates Flow Module with Lambda, publishes it, attaches as MCP tool to agent, adds security permissions

evals.prompt: I have an existing ORCHESTRATION agent in Connect and want to add a new tool that calls my payment processing Lambda. Can you help me attach it?
evals.expected_output: Gets existing agent config, creates Flow Module, generates correct toolId/toolName, updates agent with new MCP tool

evals.prompt: My Connect AI agent keeps failing when I try to add a Flow Module as a tool. It says 'MCP tool not found'. What am I doing wrong?
evals.expected_output: Identifies toolId format issue, explains aws_custom_flows__UUID_VERSION format, shows correct toolName derivation
